dms.endpoint.dynamodbsettings.CfnAbout: Provides the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role used to define an Amazon DynamoDB target endpoint.

dms.endpoint.dynamodbsettings.ServiceAcc.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) used by the service to access the IAM role. The role must allow the `iam:PassRole` action.
